# zohomail_domain (Resource)

Manage the Zoho Mail domain object and expose verification and hosting state.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zohomail_domain" "example" {
  domain_name = "example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain_name` (String) Domain name managed in Zoho Mail.

### Read-Only

- `catch_all_address` (String) Catch-all address reported by Zoho Mail, when available.
- `cname_verification_code` (String) CNAME verification code returned by Zoho Mail.
- `dkim_status` (String) Aggregated DKIM status inferred from the default DKIM selector.
- `domain_id` (String) Zoho Mail domain identifier.
- `html_verification_code` (String) HTML verification code returned by Zoho Mail.
- `id` (String) Domain resource identifier. Equal to `domain_name`.
- `is_domain_alias` (Boolean) Whether the domain is configured as a domain alias in Zoho Mail.
- `is_primary` (Boolean) Whether the domain is the primary Zoho Mail domain.
- `mail_hosting_enabled` (Boolean) Whether Zoho Mail hosting is enabled for the domain.
- `mx_status` (String) MX verification status returned by Zoho Mail.
- `spf_status` (String) SPF verification status returned by Zoho Mail.
- `subdomain_stripping_enabled` (Boolean) Whether subdomain stripping is enabled for the domain.
- `txt_verification_value` (String) TXT verification value to publish at the domain apex when using Zoho Mail TXT verification.
- `verification_status` (String) Domain verification status returned by Zoho Mail.
